quoteFirst: With this trick of wit he allayed his fury, and got him quietly,
quoteLast: , to the Hall; yet feared his former bold language might revert again, and, being brought by this trick into the toil, might have more enraged him to fly out into some strange discovery, that he had two servants placed on each side of him, with a cloak on their arms, giving them a peremptory order that if Somerset did any way fly out on the king, they should instantly hoodwink him with that cloak, take him violently from the bar, and carry him away; for which he would secure them from any danger, and they should not want a bountiful reward.

quoteFirst: Well, Pa he got asleep, and he slept till
quoteTime: about eight o'clock in the morning
